data.content: Implementation review REJECTED. Violations: (1) Grid layout from 3b4ca4f1 not reverted — settings-pools-section.tsx unchanged from main, contradicting explicit revert instruction. (2) Approach uses flex-wrap on shared AgentDisplayLabel instead of stacking pills beneath the agent name as specified. (3) AgentDisplayLabel changed from inline-flex to block-level flex, risking regressions in 7+ consumers with no analysis. Required: revert 3b4ca4f1 changes to settings-pools-section.tsx, solve overlap by stacking pills below agent name within the pool row only, leave AgentDisplayLabel default display model unchanged.
